# EyeBreak v1.0.7

Initial public release of EyeBreak, a tiny cross-platform desktop app for the 20-20-20 eye rule.

## Downloads

- Windows: `EyeBreak-1.0.7-win-x64.exe`
- macOS: `EyeBreak-1.0.7-mac-universal.dmg` or `EyeBreak-1.0.7-mac-universal.zip`
- Linux: `EyeBreak-1.0.7-linux-x86_64.AppImage` or `EyeBreak-1.0.7-linux-amd64.deb`

## Notes

Windows and macOS builds are currently unsigned, so your OS may show a warning before opening.
